summary: Upgraded Close Conversation prompt from v4-ish to v5.5 with full two-mode system, tiered close, 3-slot emoji titles. Added conversation-end-v5.md spec doc. Sanitized both files for generic users with graceful degradation for missing scripts.
learnings: The prompt references 11 scripts total. 6 exist in ode (session_state_manager, update_build, build_worker_complete, conversation_end_router, content_ingest, positions). 5 are missing (conversation_end_quick/standard/full, conversation_pii_audit, capability_graduation). Added graceful degradation patterns so prompt works without optional scripts.
concerns: W2.1 README should mention the optional scripts that could be added for full functionality. The missing tiered conversation_end scripts could be stubbed or noted as future feature.
notes_for_orchestrator: Script gap analysis complete. The close prompt now degrades gracefully when mechanical scripts are missing - it proceeds directly to semantic steps. This is documented in both the prompt and spec doc.
